Body.Content:
Copilot in Forms is being enabled for Microsoft Forms in Government Cloud environments, bringing end-to-end AI assistance to forms, from creating a form, to refining and sending to analyzing results. This rollout includes key Copilot features such as: - Draft with Copilot - Distribution and monitoring - Copilot Insights - On-canvas Copilot features such as Rewrite question, Continue writing, Answer explanations, and more.

GA date: September CY2026
